recommendations.title: The Grandmother
recommendations.overview: Susana leaves her life in Paris, where she works as a model, and returns to Madrid to take care of her grandmother Pilar.

recommendations.title: Veronica
recommendations.overview: In 1991 Madrid, after holding a séance at school, a teen girl minding her younger siblings at home suspects an evil force has entered their apartment.

recommendations.title: [REC]
recommendations.overview: A television reporter and cameraman follow emergency workers into a dark apartment building and are quickly locked inside with something terrifying.

recommendations.title: [REC]²
recommendations.overview: The action continues from [REC], with the medical officer and a SWAT team outfitted with video cameras are sent into the sealed off apartment to control the situation.

recommendations.title: [REC]³ Genesis
recommendations.overview: A pair of newlyweds must fight to survive when their wedding reception descends into chaos and carnage when their guests become infected by a virus that turns them into hungry zombies.

recommendations.title: Romasanta: The Werewolf Hunt
recommendations.overview: A terror is stalking the land: people are disappearing daily, their bodies appearing covered in savage gashes coupled with precise surgical cuts. The legend of the 'Werewolf of Allariz' spreads across the land like wildfire. When Barbara (Elsa Pataky

recommendations.title: Eye for an Eye
recommendations.overview: Mario, an exemplary man, lives in a village on the Galician coast. In the old people’s home, where he works as a nurse, everyone appreciates him. When the best known narco in the area, Antonio Padín, recently released from prison, enters the residenc

recommendations.title: V/H/S/Halloween
recommendations.overview: A collection of Halloween-themed videotapes unleashes a series of twisted, blood-soaked tales, turning trick-or-treat into a struggle for survival.
recommendations.director: Micheline Pitt-Norman, R.H. Norman, Anna Zlokovic, Casper Kelly, Bryan M. Ferguson, Alex Ross Perry, Paco Plaza

recommendations.title: Mother Joan of the Angels
recommendations.overview: A Polish priest arrives at a convent hoping to save the Mother Superior who is supposedly possessed by eight demons.

recommendations.title: Errementari: The Blacksmith and the Devil
recommendations.overview: Basque Country, Spain, 1843. A police constable arrives at a small village in Álava to investigate a mysterious blacksmith who lives alone deep in the woods.
